    recoder.kit.transformation.AppendMember
    Does not (yet) check ambiguity or conflicts.
  • Deprecated Fields
    Field
    Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeYLexer.tokenNames
    Use KeYLexer.VOCABULARY instead.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeYParser.tokenNames
    Use KeYParser.VOCABULARY instead.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml.JmlLexer.tokenNames
    Use JmlLexer.VOCABULARY instead.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml.JmlParser.tokenNames
    Use JmlParser.VOCABULARY instead.

    de.uka.ilkd.key.java.PositionInfo.getFileName()
    This method should no longer be used, as PositionInfo can now be used with resources other than files. Use PositionInfo.getURI() instead.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.EnumClassBuilder.makeExplicit(TypeDeclaration)
    THIS DOES NOT WORK ANY MORE, SINCE THE CACHE ONLY CONSIDERS CLASSE TYPES, NOT ENUMS!
    de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.RKeYMetaConstructExpression.getIndexOfChild(int)
    de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.RKeYMetaConstructType.getIndexOfChild(int)

    de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.Location.fromFileName(String, Position)
    Use Location(URI, Position) instead.

    ProofSettings.getConfiguration()
    de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.ProofSettings.loadSettingsFromPropertyStream(Reader)
    in favour of ProofSettings.loadSettingsFromJSONStream(Reader)

    Deprecated in favour of Settings.readSettings(Configuration)
    de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.Settings.writeSettings(Properties)
    Deprecated in favour of Settings.writeSettings(Configuration)
    de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.TestGenerationSettings.clone(TestGenerationSettings)

    org.key_project.util.Strings.containsWholeWord(String, String)
    This class has been merged with StringUtil. Call StringUtil.containsWholeWord(String, String)
    org.key_project.util.Strings.isJMLComment(String)
    This class has been merged with StringUtil. Call StringUtil.isJMLComment(String)

    recoder.java.NonTerminalProgramElement.getIndexOfChild(int)
     
    recoder.kit.ExpressionKit.shiftPreceedingStatementExpressions(SourceInfo, Expression, ChangeHistory)
    replaced by transformation
    recoder.kit.MethodKit.createAbstractMethodDeclaration(MethodDeclaration, boolean)
    not tested
    recoder.kit.MethodKit.createPackerClass(String, List<ParameterDeclaration>)
    needs severe rework (AL)
    recoder.kit.MethodKit.rename(ChangeHistory, CrossReferenceSourceInfo, MethodDeclaration, String)
    replaced by recoder.kit.transformation.RenameMethod
    recoder.kit.MiscKit.getParentCompilationUnit(ProgramElement)
    use UnitKit.getCompilationUnit instead
    recoder.kit.MiscKit.remove(ChangeHistory, ProgramElement)
    replaced by Transformation.replace
    recoder.kit.MiscKit.rename(ChangeHistory, NamedProgramElement, String)
    replaced by Transformation.replace
    recoder.kit.MiscKit.replace(ChangeHistory, ProgramElement, ProgramElement)
    replaced by Transformation.replace
    recoder.kit.ModifierKit.makeVisible(ChangeHistory, SourceInfo, MemberDeclaration, ClassType)
    will be replaced; does not make visible redefined members
    recoder.kit.PackageKit.rename(ChangeHistory, CrossReferenceSourceInfo, Package, String)
    replaced by recoder.kit.transformation.RenamePackage
    recoder.kit.StatementKit.canSafelyWrapWithStatementBlock(CrossReferenceSourceInfo, Statement)
     
    recoder.kit.StatementKit.preparePrepend(ChangeHistory, SourceInfo, ExpressionJumpStatement)
    will become a first class transformation
    recoder.kit.StatementKit.prepareStatementMutableList(Statement, ChangeHistory)
    replaced by first class transformation PrepareStatementList
    recoder.kit.StatementKit.wrapWithStatementBlock(Statement, ChangeHistory)
     
    recoder.kit.transformation.Modify.analyze()
    Does not check vadility of modification.
    recoder.kit.TypeKit.createAdapterClass(String, ClassDeclaration)
    needs rework
    recoder.kit.TypeKit.getInfluencedReferences(CrossReferenceSourceInfo, String, NonTerminalProgramElement)
    still untested.
    recoder.kit.TypeKit.rename(ChangeHistory, CrossReferenceSourceInfo, NameInfo, TypeDeclaration, String)
    replaced by recoder.kit.transformation.RenameType
    recoder.kit.UnitKit.appendImport(ChangeHistory, CompilationUnit, String)
    should become a fully grown transformation.
    recoder.kit.UnitKit.appendImport(ChangeHistory, CompilationUnit, ClassType)
    should become a fully grown transformation
    recoder.kit.UnitKit.ensureImport(ChangeHistory, SourceInfo, String, ProgramElement)
    needs further testing - use at your own risks
    recoder.kit.UnitKit.ensureImports(ChangeHistory, SourceInfo, ProgramElement)
    needs further testing - use at your own risks
    recoder.kit.UnitKit.normalizeImports(ChangeHistory, CrossReferenceSourceInfo, CompilationUnit, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean)
    should become a fully grown transformation.
    recoder.kit.UnitKit.removeUnusedImports(ChangeHistory, CrossReferenceSourceInfo, CompilationUnit)
    should become a first class transformation.
    recoder.kit.VariableKit.createVariableDeclaration(ServiceConfiguration, ProgramElement, Type, String)
    use createNewVariableName instead
    recoder.kit.VariableKit.rename(ChangeHistory, CrossReferenceSourceInfo, VariableSpecification, String)
    replaced by recoder.kit.transformation.RenameVariable

    this method will not be public in future - use ChangeHistory.attach instead
